<!-- indicator: fig-0to17-asthma-ed-rate -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-0to17-asthma-ed-rate
#| fig-cap: 'Asthma Emergency Department Visits, Rate per 10,000 Population 0–17 Years Old, 2017–2023'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Asthma Emergency Department Visits, Rate per 10,000 Population 0–17 Years Old, 2017–2023.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-0to17-asthma-ed-rate", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
